currency_conversion.sourced: 2026-04 hackathon static rate per Ghaisan Decision 1

tiers.description: Sandbox evaluation. Hard cap at 10000 tokens per session. Preview specialists only, no production specialist dispatch. Maps to approximately zero dollars per Builder run.
Sonnet-heavy routing with Opus limited to architectural decisions only. Target run cost under 5 USD per Builder run. Matches non-technical user entry point, parity with marketplace cheap listings.

Balanced routing across Opus for lead specialists and Sonnet for worker specialists. Target run cost 5 to 50 USD per Builder run. Recommended default for production-grade landing pages and internal tools.

Opus 4.7 across all specialists end to end. Target run cost above 50 USD per Builder run, scaling to Tokopedia-tier output at 500 to 2500 USD per run per NarasiGhaisan Section 4. Premium quality bar with full orchestration depth.
